title: sphondylium alpinum
intro: Sphondylium alpinum, also known as Alpine Marshwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in damp environments, particularly in alpine regions, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Sphondylium alpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for various forms of administration.
